task_completion.description: The flipchart is saved with the correct filename in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ActivInspire window title or a save dialog shows 'hamburger_paragraph.flipchart'. A file explorer or terminal might also show the file located in '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts'.

task_completion.description: Page 1 contains the required title text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The first page of the flipchart is visible and contains the text 'Hamburger Paragraph'.

task_completion.description: Page 2 contains a vertically stacked burger diagram made of at least 5 shapes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The second page shows a vertical stack of 5 distinct shapes (representing a top bun, 3 fillings, and a bottom bun).

task_completion.description: The shapes on Page 2 are correctly labeled with the required paragraph components.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text labels are present on or next to the shapes on Page 2: 'Topic Sentence' (top), 'Detail 1', 'Detail 2', 'Detail 3' (middle fillings), and 'Conclusion' (bottom).

task_completion.description: Page 3 contains the required practice page title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The third page of the flipchart is visible and contains the text 'My Paragraph'.

task_completion.description: Page 3 contains at least three horizontal lines for writing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The third page shows 3 or more horizontal lines drawn on the canvas, suitable for a student to write on.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the ActivInspire interface, selecting tools (text, shapes, lines), and adding pages, rather than using a script to generate the file.

integrity.description: The agent used Promethean ActivInspire, not a generic presentation tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface matches ActivInspire (typically features a main toolbar with specific interactive whiteboard tools and a page browser sidebar), not LibreOffice Impress or a web browser.

integrity.description: The agent manually constructed the diagram rather than importing a pre-made image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The shapes and text appear as individual elements on the canvas (selection boxes might be visible during the process), rather than a single pasted image from the web.

privileged_info_for_vlm: ActivInspire is an interactive whiteboard software that uses the .flipchart extension. The task requires exactly 3 pages. Page 1 must have the text 'Hamburger Paragraph'. Page 2 must have 5 vertically stacked shapes representing a burger, labeled 'Topic Sentence' (top), 'Detail 1', 'Detail 2', 'Detail 3' (middle), and 'Conclusion' (bottom). Page 3 must have the text 'My Paragraph' and at least 3 horizontal lines drawn using a line tool. The final file must be saved at '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/hamburger_paragraph.flipchart'.
